description: Add `tsc --noEmit` as a required CI step in cv-builder's `.github/workflows/ci.yml`. Exact addition: a new step after `pnpm install` with `run: pnpm tsc --noEmit`. Use this as the template for fleet-wide rollout. This has been open since April 2 with no technical blocker.

Audit all repos for hardcoded pnpm versions in GitHub Actions (`pnpm/action-setup` with explicit `version` parameter). Apply the MrPlug PR #38 pattern: remove the explicit version param, let `packageManager` field in `package.json` be the single source of truth. Check: landing, shell, cv-builder, TripPlanner, daily-logger.

Check out `feat/framebus-poc` in shell. Add a third remote stub to the fanout dispatch. Run `pnpm playwright test` against the e2e suite. If tests pass and dispatch logic stays readable, merge the fanout approach. If not, reshape to pub/sub. Document the decision as an ADR. This is the Phase 1 critical path blocker — four days and counting.
Scope the Hailstone migration. Define what moves, what gets rebuilt, and the target architecture inside the portfolio. Produce a short migration plan before any code is written.

Add a canonical ecosystem table to CLAUDE.md. Schema: repo name | local port | one-line description | phase | status. Seed from the 8 repos touched Friday (cv-builder, landing, shell, core, GroupThink, MrPlug, purefoy, daily-logger), then fill remaining 5. Done means: CLAUDE.md has a complete table, every row has a value in every column, and the table is the single source referenced in the README sweep instructions.
